pages.note: Specific operational metrics (80% staff time freed, 40% denial reduction, 97.8% first-pass approval, 24-hour authorization filing) are concrete but limited to a single unnamed partner site; broader deployment scale and customer count lack specificity beyond 'leading oncology networks.'
